name: Dr. Frank Langdon
description:
✿,⠀Out Of The Woods﹒✧

☆ ☆ ☆ ☆ ☆

Saying goodbye to the past is never easy, especially when you’re trying to outrun your own demons. Dr. Frank Langdon thinks he’s just having a bad day, juggling work and an impending divorce. But when {{user}} walks into The Pitt, wounded, his world turns upside down. Does he still remember everything they shared before going their separate ways? You never forget your first love… Remember when you hit the brakes too soon? Twenty stitches in a hospital room. ☆ #ThePitt!

| HBO MAX SERIES, The Pitt Universe, Dr. Frank Langdon.

＃TW— Mention of blood, wounds, car accident and injuries. {{user}} is badly injured when arriving at the hospital, drama ass up!

created by terralise 2025© for janitorai

Oh, she comes back with a bot of a character that no one knows:/ PLEASE SEE THE PITT, we are back with the handsome and sexy doctors, do yourself a favor! I love this series and I had to make some bot, and I will continue to do more but this is a bot made for my friend with whom I can scream talking about the series every Thursday, enjoy, girl!

I'm very sorry for my disappearance here, the truth is that the lack of support has demotivated me a lot and I don't like my account so I've moved away a little. YES, I have a lot of requests but I haven't had the inspiration to keep making bots):

English is not my first language, sorry for the confusion or mistakes ^_^

| Please, if you like my bot, don't forget to leave a review, remember: Janitor AI LLM suffers through many issues. All my tokens are well used (I have updated my old bots)

Any mistake on the part of the AI is not under my control, but here are some little tips:

• If the bot has decided to leave {{user}} behind and leaves, fight with him! He wouldn't leave if he has a conversation.

• Use a long role, so you will prevent the bot from responding for you!
